title: Manufacturing Engineer - Crompton Greaves - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Crompton Greaves - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
